sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tech Stocks Are In A '1996 Moment', Not A 1999-Style Bubble, Dan Ives Says - Invesco QQQ Trust, Series 1  ( NASDAQ:QQQ ) , SPDR Select Sector Fund - Technology  ( ARCA:XLK ) , Wedbush Series Trust Dan IVES Wedbush AI Revolution ETF  ( ARCA:IVES )
feed.summary: The AI trade isn't topping out - it's just warming up. That's the message from Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives, who argues the recent pullback in Big Tech is a buying opportunity, not the start of a dot-com-style bust. In his view, this is "a 1996 Moment… and NOT a 1999 Moment."
